zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Elias de Bosvil of Harthill於大約1120年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親William De Bosville72歲，母親Mrs. William De Bosville65歲。他和Alice de Newmarch至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1182年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可卡素 阿可享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Elias de Bosvil of Harthill于大约1120年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲William De Bosville72岁，母亲Mrs. William De Bosville65岁。他和Alice de Newmarch至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1182年在英国英格兰諾福爾可卡素 阿可享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Harthill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places called Harthill (Cheshire, Derbys, and WR Yorks).
2  Scottish: locative name from Harthill near Inverurie (Aberdeens) or, less likely, from the barony of Harthill (Lanarks).

variants.name: Hartell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Theresia.
English and Scottish: variant of   Hartle  .
Americanized form of German Hartel or Härtel.

variants.name: Hartles
meanings: English: variant of Hartle ( see Harthill ) with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Hartill
meanings: English (Staffordshire) and Scottish: variant of   Hartle  .

variants.name: Hartle
meanings: German (also Härtle): from a pet form of the various ancient Germanic compound names formed with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’ as the first element.

English (Worcestershire and Staffordshire): habitational name from any of the three places called Harthill (Cheshire, Derbyshire, and Yorkshire), named with Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + hyll ‘hill’.
Scottish: habitational name from Harthill near Inverurie (Aberdeenshire) or, less likely, from the barony of Harthill (Lanarkshire), probably from the same etymology as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Elias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Greek form (used in the New Testament) of the name of the prophet   Elijah .  It is one of a number of Old Testament names which have come back into favour since the latter part of the 20th century.  See also  Ellis .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Elias de Bosvil of Harthill was born about 1120, in England, United Kingdom, his father, William De Bosville, was 72 and his mother, Mrs. William De Bosville, was 65. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Alice de Newmarch. He died in 1182, in Castle Acre, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Elias de Bosvil of Harthill est né environ 1120, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Bosville, avait 72 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William De Bosville, avait 65 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Alice de Newmarch. Il est décédé en 1182, à Castle Acre, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Elias de Bosvil of Harthillが約1120年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父William De Bosvilleは72歳，母Mrs. William De Bosvilleは65歳であった。彼はAlice de Newmarchとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1182年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクカストル アクアで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Elias de Bosvil of Harthill(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Bosville(은)는 72세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William De Bosville(은)는 65세였다. 그는 Alice de Newmarch(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1182년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 카스틀 악르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Elias de Bosvil of Harthill родился около 1120 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William De Bosville было 72 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William De Bosville, 65. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Alice de Newmarch. Он умер в 1182 г. в местности кастл акр, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.
